Interface ISegmentMeanShiftFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("4E91D1ED-E61C-4BF9-AAD9-0352A8FEA4BD")]
public interface ISegmentMeanShiftFunctionArguments

Properties

AddedFrameWidth

Width of safety frame added around pixel block, in pixel. Optional. Default is 128.

int AddedFrameWidth { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

BoundariesOnly

Output segment boundaries only. All other pixel invalid.

bool BoundariesOnly { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MinNumPixelsPerSegment

Segments smaller than this get merged with best fitting neighbor segment.

int MinNumPixelsPerSegment { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

NumThreadsToUse

Number of threads to use. Optional. Default is 50% of available cores.

int NumThreadsToUse { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Raster

The input raster. 3 bands (color) or 1 band (greyvalue), 8 bits per band.

object Raster { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialDetail

The spatial detail. Range [1..20]. Radius = 22 - detail.

int SpatialDetail { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialRadius

The radius for mean computation, spatial part.

int SpatialRadius { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpectralDetail

The spectral detail. Range [1..20]. Radius = 22 - detail.

double SpectralDetail { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpectralRadius

The radius for mean computation, spectral part.

double SpectralRadius { get; set; }

Property Value

double
